name: Web Components
description: Enhanced implementation of Custom Elements supporting Scoped Registries and standard Dependency Injection.
summary: Custom Elements with scoped registries and standard dependency injection.
tierEvidence: Custom Elements + Scoped Registries is the component substrate every benchmark design system and the named frameworks Lit/Stencil ship; FUI's component runtime (packages/jsx-runtime, packages/component-compiler) is built on it.
